msg: Control flow of non-void function ends here!
reasoning: Same file and same missing-return issue in main() as FAMILY_18, but with presence condition !def(CONFIG_CRYPTO_TEST). When !CONFIG_CRYPTO_TEST, main has an empty body {}. Again: (1) In C99+, main() implicitly returns 0 — not a real bug. (2) The missing return in main is unconditional (exists in all configurations), so neither def nor !def CRYPTO_TEST is the right constraint. The presence condition is wrong. False positive, same reasoning as FAMILY_18.
